name: Epsilon Energy Ltd.
summary: . Summary Epsilon EnergyLtd. (the Company or Epsilon or we) was incorporated under the laws of the Province of Alberta, Canada on March14, 2005, pursuant to the ABCA. The Company is extra-provincially registered in Ontario pursuant to the Business Corporations Act (Ontario). Epsilon is a North American on-shore focused independent natural gas and oil company engaged in the acquisition, development, gathering and production of natural gas and oil reserves.
